title: neomammillaria multiceps
intro: Neomammillaria multiceps, also known as the Night-Blooming Cereus or Selenicereus, is a type of cactus plant native to the deserts of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neomammillaria multiceps include its ability to reduce fever, ease respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea or tincture, and is often used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
